titles.title: I Am One Of The Few

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I am one of the few, one of the few, And by faith in God's Word I can claim it. Tho' the way may seem long, Tho' the opposition strong, For the Bride there's a way provided. If I plan to go through Just to hope will not do, I must be firmly decided To follow the Lord by obeying His Word And believe that I'm one of the few.
